introSection: Super Odyssey Coaster is a Jinma Rides Super Spinning Coaster at Silk Road Paradise.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: Single car trains. Riders are arranged 2 across in 2 rows for 4 riders per train.

fullText:
Super Odyssey Coaster is a Jinma Rides Super Spinning Coaster at Silk Road Paradise.

Single car trains. Riders are arranged 2 across in 2 rows for 4 riders per train.
